title: Dortmanna circaeodes
taxonomy: Dortmanna circaeodes is a species of flowering plant in the family Lythraceae. It belongs to the genus Dortmanna, which is a monotypic genus containing only this species. Dortmanna circaeodes is native to China, specifically in the provinces of Guangdong and Guangxi. The classification of Dortmanna circaeodes is further categorized as a member of the family Lythraceae, order Myrtales, and class Magnoliopsida. Its classification makes it a part of the larger angiosperm group.
